notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11 (Wikipedia, Al Jazeera encyclopedia, Algeria's Ministry of Religious Affairs): April 16 marks Sheikh Abdelhamid Ben Badis's death anniversary (1889-1940), founder of the Association of Algerian Muslim Ulama (1931).
Verified establishment: created by President Houari Boumediene's initiative, first celebrated 1976.
Explicitly confirmed NOT a paid public holiday (direct source statement) — same 'commemoration != confirmed paid holiday' pattern as victory-day-algeria, mujahid-day-algeria, karameh-day-jordan.
Positive historical topic (honoring a scholar/educator), no political sensitivity requiring special framing.
Single-country event (_countryCode: dz), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
